# `.state/` — progress state (git-tracked)

This directory holds Daedalus's **progress state** for this project (e.g. which backlog steps have run and their outcomes).

It is **canonical, relevant state**: it is committed to git on purpose so the whole team shares one source of truth and the project stays portable across machines. Do **not** add it to `.gitignore`.

State is stored as plain text (YAML/Markdown) for clean diffs and merges. This README is a tracked placeholder so the directory persists in git even while empty; Daedalus never deletes your files here.

> Generated by `daedalus init`. Safe to keep; safe to extend.
